name: megapowers
description: Workflow methodology: brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, review, worktrees, and subagent orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Workflow skills for disciplined agentic development.
interface.longDescription: An opinionated set of reusable process skills for brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, review, worktrees, verification, and branch finishing.
defaultPrompt: Use megapowers to plan this change.
Use megapowers to debug this failure.
Use megapowers to review this branch.
